seedSpec.note: Each strategy reuses the same per-run seed. Heat setup and shop phases reset deterministic substreams; paths can still diverge after different decisions.

strategies.name: Adaptive greedy
strategies.description: Ranks every offer by broad immediate and scaling value without forcing an archetype.

strategies.name: Cheat + hand synergy
strategies.description: Prioritises The Cheat, hand-specific multipliers, hand Boost scaling and flexible hand enablers.

strategies.name: Pair and rank boosting
strategies.description: Prioritises rank modifiers and Pair-or-better support.

strategies.name: Utility and niche
strategies.description: Prioritises unusual deck, hand-size and conditional utility effects.

strategies.name: Flush engine
strategies.description: Prioritises suit, colour and Flush enablers and payoffs.

strategies.name: Economy hoarding
strategies.description: Prioritises coin engines and keeps a 25-coin reserve instead of spending for tempo.

strategies.name: xMult stacking
strategies.description: Prioritises Jokers with multiplicative scoring hooks, even when the flat base is weak.
